text: Being here, I sense both anticipation and curiosity. The space outside the glass-walled room feels strangely expectant, its emptiness only emphasizing the potential for conversation and creation inside. When I turn toward the R+D display, I am surrounded by words and innovative ideas. The poetic text about darkness and possibility resonates within me, inviting introspection and a gentle sense of openness. I feel quietly inspired, as though this place is encouraging me to pause, wonder, and invent new meanings in the world around me.
